articles.title: Iran war isn't a T-20 match, says Shankar Sharma after a kamikaze drone skims over his UAE villa
articles.content: A resident of Ras Al-Khaimah in the UAE for 15 years, Shankar Sharma believes that India will be worse off if the conflict draws out for long. He predicts Indian equity markets will be a laggard for the second year on the trot and suggested commodities as the asset class he would recommend.
articles.primarySourceTitle: Iran war isn't a T-20 match, says Shankar Sharma after a kamikaze drone skims over his UAE villa
